title: Trifecta (unofficial)
description: My attempt to recreate modpack used by Threefold in his youtube series.
body:
# !!! This pack is no longer maintained. Please switch to the official version !!!

### My attempt to recreate modpack used by Threefold, Extra Cool Cat and Lashmak in their YouTube series. 

Threefold YouTube playlist:
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLitR_6VqTWICbA5EQpl83q0rrFQKzsLyL

Extra Cool Cat playlist:
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLpiPQ6xHc72QlzWLWSm3-_wXuR09yFhva

Lashmak YouTube playlist:
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLtWyX5YeBQtP7wsP-rfBFRn4vLqCPHKd9

## Datapacks
The datapacks used in the YouTube series will be automatically added to your world on creation (from version 0.4.0).


## Important  Remember to also check out the official version on curse: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/trifecta-smp  
- I'm not affiliated with any of the creators
- To make this pack function better there are some additional performance mods non of them change the gameplay though.
- Non performance mods added by me:
    - Discord Integration
    - Global Data and Resource Packs

## Report an Issue:
https://gitlab.com/trifecta-modpack/trifecta-modpack/-/issues


#

#### Mod information:

#### Datapack credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
